rules:
🥃 1. MUST BE 18+
🥃 2. Do not impersonate staff.
🥃 3. Staff members must not be blocked.
🥃 4. Follow VRChat's TOS.
🥃 5. SFW only (no explicit nudity).
🥃 6.Keep the environment drama-free.
🥃 7.Be respectful to others.
🥃 8. Do not pressure anyone into doing any sort of drugs.
🥃 9. Drink responsibly.
🥃 10. When there’s a live DJ, do not play music through your microphone.

For drinking songs, please go somewhere remote where others will not be disturbed. Staff will warn you. If it persists, you will be removed from the instance.

Final rule: Clean up!
